name: ingraft-workspace
description: Monorepo workspace for the ingraft repository-context CLI, agent skill, TUI dashboard, and documentation website.
author: Gunther Brunner <gunta85@gmail.com> (https://github.com/gunta)

scripts.check:root: bun run lint && bun run format:check
scripts.whitepaper:build: bun run whitepaper:clean && bun run whitepaper:build:pdf && bun run whitepaper:build:html
scripts.whitepaper:build:pdf: cd docs/whitepaper && mkdir -p _build _output && PATH="/Library/TeX/texbin:$PATH" latexmk -lualatex -interaction=nonstopmode -halt-on-error -file-line-error -jobname=index -outdir=_build paper.tex && cp _build/index.pdf _output/index.pdf
scripts.whitepaper:watch: cd docs/whitepaper && mkdir -p _build && PATH="/Library/TeX/texbin:$PATH" latexmk -pvc -lualatex -interaction=nonstopmode -file-line-error -jobname=index -outdir=_build paper.tex
scripts.whitepaper:publish: bun run whitepaper:build && rm -rf packages/website/public/whitepaper packages/website/public/whitepaper.pdf && mkdir -p packages/website/public/whitepaper && cp docs/whitepaper/_output/index.pdf packages/website/public/whitepaper/index.pdf && cp docs/whitepaper/_output/index.pdf packages/website/public/whitepaper.pdf && cp docs/whitepaper/_output/index.html packages/website/public/whitepaper/index.html
